name: Task Execution Engine
description: Handles launching, monitoring, pausing, cancelling, and completing AI tasks as OS processes. Coordinates the full task lifecycle from CLI invocation through streaming output to final status resolution.

Managers/TaskExecutionManager.cs.content:
class TaskExecutionManager
  LaunchHeadless(AgentTask task) -> void
  CancelTaskImmediate(AgentTask task) -> void
  KillProcess(AgentTask task) -> void
  RemoveStreamingState(string taskId) -> void
  PauseTask(AgentTask task) -> void
  SpawnSubtask(AgentTask parent, string description, bool inheritSettings = true) -> AgentTask
  SpawnSubtaskAndQueue(AgentTask parent, string description) -> AgentTask
  ExtractAndSpawnSubtasks(AgentTask parent, string output) -> List<AgentTask>?
  InjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask parent, AgentTask child) -> void
  ExtractAndSpawnTeam(AgentTask parent, string output) -> List<AgentTask>?
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<int>?
  Role: string
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<int>?

Managers/TaskProcessLauncher.cs.content:
class TaskProcessLauncher
  ProcessQueuedMessagesCallback: Action<AgentTask, ObservableCollection<AgentTask>, ObservableCollection<AgentTask>>?
  StartManagedProcess(AgentTask task, Process process) -> void
  KillProcess(AgentTask task) -> void
  RemoveStreamingState(string taskId) -> void
  CleanupScripts(string taskId) -> void
  PauseTask(AgentTask task) -> void

patterns: Pause/unpause preserves conversation ID and process
dependencies: Claude Code CLI via PowerShell pipe
